name: Soupa Fassolia (Bean Soup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the beans and soak them overnight in cold water. Rinse well.
2. Place the beans in a large pot and cover with enough water by about 1 inch. Bring to a boil.
3. Pour off the water and replace it with fresh hot water.
4. Chop onions, celery stalks, and carrots into rounds.
5. Add all the vegetables to the beans.
6. Add oil.
7. Simmer for about 45 minutes.
8. Add tomato paste diluted with some of the liquid from the pot. Season to taste.
9. Continue simmering for another 20 minutes longer.
10. Serve hot. If desired, thin the soup with water, chicken broth, vegetable stock, or liquid from canned vegetables.
